title: Figure 16 in Biological characteristics and functions of a novel glutamate dehydrogenase from Trichinella spiralis
author: Cheng, Yong Kang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 16. RNAi inhibition of natural TsGDH enzyme activity and metabolism of intestinal Trichinella spiralis worms from infected mice. The natural TsGDH enzyme activity, content of ATP, sugar and lipids, and ammonia nitrogen excretion of 24 h IIL, 3 and 6 d AWs were significantly reduced in the dsRNA-TsGDH group. *p <0.05 relative to the PBS group.
steps_raw: Figure 16. RNAi inhibition of natural TsGDH enzyme activity and metabolism of intestinal Trichinella spiralis worms from infected mice. The natural TsGDH enzyme activity, content of ATP, sugar and lipids, and ammonia nitrogen excretion of 24 h IIL, 3 and 6 d AWs were significantly reduced in the dsRNA-TsGDH group. *p <0.05 relative to the PBS group.
